case_title: IN RE: DE LA PENA & MCDONALD, LLP

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-07-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER DE LA PENA & MCDONALD, LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE FEE ARBITRATION BECAME FINAL WHEN DEFENDANT TOOK NO ACTION WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE AND DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN NO BASIS TO VACATE THE AWARD. (TOTAL -$10,650.31) MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT RICKEY GREEN'S (AMENDED) PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.
